==Biography==
===2014 Season===
Patara "'''Cherie'''" Bhatarabhirom played for a number of minor teams during the [[2014 Thailand Pro League]] (TPL), such as [[Kero]] in Spring (using the name '''IIIIIXXX''') and [[Icicle Blade]] in Summer (using the name '''In The Air X'''). He played a number of positions, including mid lane and top lane, although his primary role was jungler. Afterward, [[Team Infinite]] picked up Cherie as the team's starting jungler for the [[Thailand Grand Championship 2014]]. Team Infinite placed 2nd, behind perennial powerhouse [[Bangkok Titans]], and qualified for the next [[Garena Premier League]] (GPL) tournament.

===2015 Season===
Cherie remained the starting jungler for Team Infinite during the [[2015 GPL Spring]]. Team Infinite was placed into Group B, alongside strong Vietnamese teams [[An Phat Ultimate]] and [[Saigon Fantastic Five]]. The team was eliminated from the tournament without a single win. The team also encountered difficulty during the [[2015 Thailand Pro League/Spring|2015 TPL Spring]], failing to reach the Final Bracket. Afterward, Team Infinite's roster disbanded. Cherie joined a new team called [[Arairhor]] to compete in the [[2015 Thailand Pro League/Summer|2015 TPL Summer]]. Arairhor failed to reach the Final Bracket and rebranded as [[Miss in Action]].

===2016 Season===
For the first part of the [[Thailand Pro League/2016 Season/Spring Season|2016 TPL Spring]], Cherie swapped to top lane. Miss in Action did well enough in the Group Stage to reach the playoffs, by which time Cherie returned to the jungle. However, Miss in Action was disqualified from the tournament after the first round of playoffs due to an abuse of global rules. Many of the team's players, including Cherie, were found Elo boosting and cheating during the tournament. Cherie received a three-year suspension for his actions.<ref>[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Wvtx2lBwfhEjEc8xp0I1Odhy-BIgd0LvpsuJd5Lhb70/edit#gid=0 รายชื่อของผู้เล่นที่ถูกระงับการแข่งขันเนื่องจากทำความผิดในเรื่องของ Global Penalty] ''docs.google.com''</ref>
